case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. VS. STEVEN JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEVEN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
DECLARATION DECLARATION RE: INTEREST ON S/S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEVEN $16,086.12 PRINCIPAL, $10,246.73 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,702.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT; APPL FOR AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDG; JUGMENT; INFO SHEET; INTEREST CALCULATION POS BY MAIL; DUE DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. SERVED SEP-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEVEN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $5,095.07 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 57390821) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100020150) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, STEVEN
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
